title: Strutting Staffs
description: some fun new staffs with diverse effects!
body:
Strutting staffs is a simple mod that adds a handful of fun new staffs to the game.

First you will need to craft a staff with 2 sticks and a blaze rod…

Then add other ingredients like slime, flint, lapis, gold, and wither rose, etc; to create some powerful and unique magical weapons!


Crafting recipes are shapeless and in the gallery
